prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热 推荐，临床医学、口腔医学热度稳定，生化环材类仍为明显劝退；河南省 2026 年普通高考考生总数约 120 万（含不确定标记），较 2025 年约 90.7 万大幅增加约 32%，全省竞争显著加剧；兰州大学位于甘肃省，距河南较远，地域偏好上河南考生更倾向省内及东部高校；该校在河南招生占 比约 1.3%–1.6%（2021–2024 年），2025 年占比约 16.4%（因总招生人数统计口径变化），属跨省招生中等规模。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 21866 → 14255 → 18105 → 37744 → 37473. In 2024, the ranking significantly dropped to 37744, and in 2025 it remained roughly stable at 37473, indicating a clear change in the competitive landscape over the past two years. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Henan: 104 in 2021, 105 in 2022, 96 in 2023, 82 in 2024, and 148 in 2025. According to §7 document for 2026, the physics category plan is 130, plus 59 for medical category (also open to physics category students), totaling 189, an increase of about 27.7% compared to 148 in 2025, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a directly affiliated 985, 211, and Double First-Class university under the Ministry of Education. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has been stable at 38–40 in recent years, ranking 40th in 2026, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 985 universities. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly positive, mainly due to a master's graduate thanking the security department in their thesis acknowledgments for allowing a waste-picking elderly person to enter the campus, demonstrating humanistic care and enhancing the university's image. Its Douyin popularity ranks 53rd overall, rated as relatively hot with moderate attention. No significant enrollment gaps have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Ecology received A+, Grass Science A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, and Biology A-, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above, with Grass Science and Ecology at the national top level, directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Grass Science and Ecology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended. Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have stable popularity, while majors in Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are still clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan general college entrance examination is about 1.2 million (including uncertain markers), a significant increase of about 32% compared to approximately 907,000 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition across the province. Lanzhou University is located in Gansu Province, far from Henan, and Henan candidates tend to prefer universities within the province or in the eastern region. The university's enrollment proportion in Henan was about 1.3%–1.6% (2021–2024), and about 16.4% in 2025 (due to changes in total enrollment statistics), representing a medium scale of cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 37473, the combined expansion of physics and medical categories by about 27.7% in 2026, the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of Henan candidates, and the slightly positive university reputation, the effect of enrollment expansion in easing competition partially offsets the intensifying effect of the surge in candidates. However, the actual total plan expansion and the large increase in candidates still make competition more intense. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 35239, with a range of 34739–35739.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<34739), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>35739), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as backups.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 2026 → 2097 → 2985 → 5265 → 2754. In 2024, the ranking significantly dropped to 5265, but in 2025 it rebounded to 2754, showing large fluctuations with a recent decline followed by an increase. For 2026, Document §7 shows a history category plan of 33, an increase of about 13.8% from 29 in 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a directly affiliated 985, 211, and Double First-Class university under the Ministry of Education. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable at 38–40 in recent years, ranking 40th in 2026, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 985 universities. The reputation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly positive, with humanities-related events enhancing its image. Its overall Douyin popularity ranks 53rd, rated as relatively hot. No significant enrollment gaps have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Ecology and Grassland Science received A+, Chemistry, Geography, and Biology received A-. Among these, Geography A- is related to the Geography Science category (science) in history category admissions, while no liberal arts majors directly have A-class disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Journalism and Communication show divergent popularity: Law is recommended but highly competitive, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, and Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (including uncertain marks), a significant increase of about 32% from approximately 907,000 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition across the province. Lanzhou University is located in Gansu Province, far from Henan, and Henan liberal arts candidates tend to prefer universities within the province or in the eastern region. The university's enrollment share in Henan is about 1.3%–1.6% (2021–2024), a medium scale for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2754, the 2026 history category enrollment expansion of about 13.8%, the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of Henan exam takers, and the slightly positive university reputation: the expansion eases competition, but the surge in exam takers intensifies competition more significantly, so the ranking is expected to slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 2932, with a range of 2492–3372.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 兰州大学在河南省医学类单独招生批次中，2021年最低位次21866（计划24人），2022年13797（计划25人），2023年18105（计划29人），2024年5265（计划24人），2025年3747 3（计划46人）。五年间位次波动极大，2024年因护理学（文科）拉低整体最低位次至5265，2025年大幅回升至37473。2026年招生计划大幅扩招至59人（较2025年增加13人，扩幅 28.26%），扩招力度显著，对位次产生明显的下拉效应（位次数字减小，更易录取）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 兰州大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家『985工程』和『211工程』重点建设高校，入选『双一流』建设高校名单。作为西北地区综合性大学的标杆，其医学学科历史悠久、 底蕴深厚，临床医学、口腔医学等专业在全国具有较高认可度，对河南考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续高涨，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争激烈。兰州大学虽地处西北，但其985平台和医学学科实力使其在河南仍保持较强吸引力。2026年医学 类大幅扩招至59人，招生规模显著扩大，一定程度上缓解了竞争压力，但医学类专业整体热度不减。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及历年趋势修正，预测2026年兰州大学在河南省医学类最低录取位次为43527名左右，较2025年（37473）位次数字增大（更难进），但考虑到扩招28.26 %的稀释效应，实际增幅小于纯公式结果。预计录取区间在43091至43963名之间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In the separate medical enrollment batch of Lanzhou University in Henan Province, the minimum ranking was 21866 (plan 24) in 2021, 13797 (plan 25) in 2022, 18105 (plan 29) in 2023, 5265 (plan 24) in 2024, and 37473 (plan 46) in 2025. Rankings fluctuated greatly over the five years. In 2024, nursing (liberal arts) lowered the overall minimum ranking to 5265, and in 2025 it rebounded sharply to 37473. In 2026, the enrollment plan significantly expanded to 59 (an increase of 13 from 2025, an expansion of 28.26%), with a notable expansion intensity, producing an obvious downward pull effect on rankings (ranking number decreases, easier admission).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and is included in the 'Double First-Class' construction university list. As a benchmark comprehensive university in the northwest region, its medical disciplines have a long history and profound heritage. Clinical medicine, stomatology, and other majors have high recognition nationwide, exerting continuous attraction for Henan candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the application popularity for medical majors has been consistently high, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology facing fierce competition. Although Lanzhou University is located in the northwest, its 985 platform and medical discipline strength maintain strong appeal in Henan. In 2026, the medical category significantly expanded enrollment to 59, greatly increasing the enrollment scale, which to some extent alleviates competitive pressure, but the overall popularity of medical majors remains unabated.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and historical trend correction, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Lanzhou University's medical category in Henan Province in 2026 is around 43527, which is a larger ranking number (harder to enter) compared to 2025 (37473), but considering the dilution effect of the 28.26% expansion, the actual increase is smaller than the pure formula result. The expected admission range is between 43091 and 43963.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (43091-43963), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Clinical medicine and stomatology are the most competitive, requiring a ranking far above the upper limit of the predicted range to be confident; Tier 2 majors such as preventive medicine and pharmacy have a higher match with the predicted range; nursing is a relatively safe choice as a backup.
